headline: PE's 'Buyout Revival' hits warp speed as GPs deploy record $1.1T to reshape sectors

stories.title: Walgreens Going Private: Sycamore's $23.7B Healthcare Restructuring Play
stories.summary: Sycamore Partners took Walgreens private for $23.7B to strip non-core assets and focus on high-margin healthcare services away from public scrutiny. The deal uses AI-driven operational overhauls to transform retail pharmacy into anchor platform for bolt-on acquisitions.
stories.takeaway: Margin expansion through strategic asset pruning and operational modernization—PE's new playbook for legacy retail brands.

stories.title: Electronic Arts $56.6B Take-Private: Silver Lake Bets on AI-Driven Efficiency
stories.summary: Silver Lake led consortium takes EA private in largest gaming deal ever, targeting complex cost structure simplification thru proprietary AI. Deal signals mega-sponsors now capable of mega-scale transformations once considered impossible.
stories.takeaway: Tech sector seeing 25% of all 2025-26 deal value concentrated in AI-enabled complexity reduction—that's the real edge.

stories.title: Healthcare IT Boom Continues: Record $191B in 2025, PE Floods Medical Education
stories.summary: Healthcare PE hit record $191B in deal value last year, w/ IT deals doubling to $32B. Labor shortages now driving PE into medical education platforms to build talent pipelines—prof services spin off nursing schools & residency models.
stories.takeaway: Labor shortage = exit opportunity: PE betting big on building training infrastructure to solve the talent crisis.
stories.source: Healthcare Dive / Bain Global PE Report

stories.title: Industrials Consolidation Hits New Gear: Field Services Platforms Attract PE Scale
stories.summary: Field services & industrials seeing sustained momentum as PE funds deploy $400M+ debut vehicles targeting lower mid-market consolidation. AI-enabled service platforms gaining valuations premium as acquirers scale predictable, recurring revenue models.
stories.takeaway: Boring beats sexy: Field services standardization via AI tooling is lowkey one of the best margin expansion stories right now.

watchNext.title: GPLed Continuation Vehicles Explode 62% YoY—Exit Crunch Getting Real
watchNext.why: As hold periods extend and IPO window remains tight, GP-led secondaries becoming critical liquidity valve. 1 in 4 GPs now initiating CVs per Bain survey—this reshaping exit playbooks & LP distributions.

watchNext.title: PE's New Math: Revenue Growth Now Beats Leverage as Return Driver
watchNext.why: Higher rates killed multiple expansion playbook—now GPs chasing double-digit EBITDA growth through operational levers. BCG saying returns now separable (growth, margin, leverage, multiple), forcing GPs to pick specializations.
